best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-paginadettagliata-004 title: user returns to homepage module: pagina dettagliata source pages: 2 preconditions: user is on the "ritorno ad homepage" page. test data: test steps: 1. click on the "modifica preferenze" link. 2. verify that the "ritorno ad homepage" page redirects to the "pagina dettagliata" page. expected result: the user should return to the "pagina dettagliata" page.
